name: Noise Filtering
purpose: Remove license/footer/policy noise while preserving product signal. Compute signal strength score.
design_intent: Filter BEFORE LLM to reduce context noise. Signal score determines whether LLM stage is needed.
change_impact: New filtering logic; previously LLM handled noise implicitly. LLM skip condition added.

types.stage0Output: Stage0Output from stage-locate-v1 — provides titleText + bodyText (Trafilatura-extracted plain text)
types.stage1Output: Stage1Output from stage-classify-v1 — provides postType for skip path

input_contract.note: stage-structure-v1 deprecated. Trafilatura in Stage 0 replaces Cheerio DOM extraction. Stage 2 receives clean plain text; no DOM parsing needed here. Cheerio step_0 removed.

required_fields: cleanBlocks - Array<{ text, lineIndex, hasPrice, hasDuration, hasProductKeyword, filterReason? }>
contentForLlm - string (filtered blocks joined as clean text for Stage 3 prompt)
optional_fields: skip - boolean (true when postType is affiliate or promo_code)

signal_scoring.llm_skip_condition: signalScore >= 0.85 AND cleanProducts.length > 0 AND all products have catalog match

preserve_rules: Keep blocks with price pattern (₩XXX,XXX or XXX,XXX원)
Keep blocks with duration pattern (N개월 or N년)
Keep blocks with product keywords (프리미엄, 구독, NETFLIX, etc.)
remove_rules: Remove blocks with ONLY license info
Remove blocks longer than 100 chars with no price/duration
edge_cases: Block has both license AND price → preserve, mark filterReason='partial_noise'
Block has product keyword AND noise → preserve, mark filterReason='mixed'

text_extraction.note: Trafilatura output is plain text — no DOM parsing needed. Stage 2 splits bodyText into lines/paragraphs.
text_extraction.step_0: Split stage0Output.bodyText by newline/paragraph boundaries → rawBlocks[]
text_extraction.step_1: Apply noise_patterns regex to each block → filtered vs removed
text_extraction.step_2: For each surviving block: match price pattern + duration pattern + product keyword
text_extraction.step_3: Score signal per block → compute overall signalScore

skip_by_post_type.affiliate: Return Stage2Output with cleanProducts=[], signalScore=0, llmRequired=false, skip=true
skip_by_post_type.promo_code: Return Stage2Output with cleanProducts=[], signalScore=0, llmRequired=false, skip=true
skip_by_post_type.comparison: Run extraction + filter, flag contentForLlm for comparison context
skip_by_post_type.unknown: Run full extraction + filter, add warning

test_cases.name: Mixed content
test_cases.expected: 2 cleanProducts, filterReasons for FAQ/payment, llmRequired based on signal

acceptance_criteria: Test cases TC-2.1 through TC-2.4 pass
